title: DSA: Hash Maps and Frequency Counting (LeetCode Easy)
content:
### Day 21: DSA: Hash Maps and Frequency Counting (LeetCode Easy)

**Hash Maps (Dictionaries)** provide O(1) average lookup. Perfect for counting, grouping, and caching.

**Frequency Counting Pattern:** Loop through data, use dict to count occurrences.

**Common Interview Problems:** Two Sum, Anagram check, First unique character.
practiceQuestions: Solve Two Sum with hash map.
Check if two strings are anagrams.
keyTakeaways: Hash Maps (Dictionaries) provide O(1) average lookup.
Perfect for counting, grouping, and caching.
Frequency Counting Pattern: Loop through data, use dict to count occurrences.
